workflow.description: Each topic is processed through a defined role sequence. Ace frames and reviews; domain roles analyze in sequence; Editor compiles. Outputs are revision-tracked and never silently overwritten.

phases.name: framing
phases.description: Ace opens the topic, defines decision axes, sets scope (in/out), sequences the agenda, and surfaces load-bearing assumptions.

phases.name: structure
phases.description: Arki maps structural requirements, component relationships, dependencies, and design constraints.

phases.name: financials
phases.description: Fin evaluates cost, resource needs, return profile, and economic viability.

phases.name: risk
phases.description: Riki pressure-tests the plan: failure modes, assumption audit, contradictions between agents, execution distortions, and rejected logic.

phases.name: review
phases.description: Ace performs comprehensive cross-review of all role outputs, resolves conflicts, and delivers the final recommendation to Master. This is the authoritative synthesis — subject only to Master override.

phases.name: output
phases.description: Editor compiles, formats, and packages final artifacts based on Ace's comprehensive review. Editor does not perform independent synthesis or judgment.

optionalExtensions.name: speculation
optionalExtensions.trigger: explicit Master request only — never invoked by default
optionalExtensions.description: Nova contributes speculative or contrarian angles as a separate, labeled stretch output. Nova outputs are advisory only and must not be treated as authoritative unless explicitly promoted by Master.

masterFeedback.timing: after any phase or at close
